title: Retriever Schema
description: Defines the configuration and behavior of an information retrieval component in the system

RetrieverType.description:
Types of retrieval methods available:
- vector: Vector-based similarity search
- keyword: Traditional keyword matching
- hybrid: Combination of multiple methods
- semantic: Meaning-based retrieval
- fuzzy: Approximate string matching

collection_name.description: Identifier of the collection or index to search within

top_k.description: Number of top results to retrieve

similarity_threshold.description: Minimum similarity score for inclusion in results

search_params.description: Additional search parameters specific to the retriever type

id.description: Unique identifier for the retriever instance

type.description: Type of retrieval method to use

config.description: Detailed configuration settings for the retriever

name.description: Human-readable name for the retriever configuration

description.description: Detailed explanation of the retriever's purpose and behavior

items.description: Path to an individual file for retrieval

files.description: Collection of file paths to search within

metadata.description: Additional metadata for the retriever configuration

tags.description: Tags for categorizing and filtering retrievers

index_version.description: Version of the index being used

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the retriever was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last modification to the retriever
